labor_share.method: BLS Industry Productivity (IPS) at ancestor 3359: labor compensation (L02) $16,718.5M / sectoral output (T30) $70,805.2M, year 2024
sources: BLS Industry Productivity and Costs flat files (ip.data.1.AllData), measures L02 and T30

n_total.source: QCEW 2024 private annual avg establishments (SUSB out of scope for this code; establishments are a proxy for firms — overcounts multi-unit firms)

n_band.derivation: margin 0.1962 (margins.json[33]: Damodaran Jan 2026: Machinery EBITDA/Sales 19.62%); revenue/employee $469,082 (SUSB 2022 receipts/employment at 33591); DATA GAP: no SUSB size-class data for this code; n_band could not be computed — the research run must supply it with a shown chain, quality ESTIMATE
